pom.xml.general_idea: Exclude the legacy JUnit 4 dependency from a transitive dependency to avoid conflicts with JUnit 5.
pom.xml.why_exists: JUnit 4 classes may conflict with JUnit 5 (Jupiter) used in Spring Boot 3, potentially causing test discovery failures or runtime classpath issues.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace the deprecated webjars-locator with webjars-locator-core.
pom.xml.why_exists: The old webjars-locator artifact is deprecated and may not be compatible with the newer Spring Boot 3 classpath scanning or WebJars integration mechanisms.
